title: STATION 7 YOUTH DAYTIME CENTER - 211info
text: STATION 7 STATION 7 YOUTH DAYTIME CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop in center for young adults. Services include: wifi, charging stations for devices, games, music, movies, information on social services, and dinner. 931 W 7th Avenue Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Runaway and homeless youth ages 11-20 Hours: 7 days per week 5pm-7pm Email (541) 689-3111 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 689-3111 Main phone (888) 689-3111 Crisis Hotline Main phone (541) 689-3111 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Youth Centers Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - STATION 7 SHELTER AND CRISIS LINE LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - SAFE PLACE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. STATION 7
